---
title: "Herbert Simcoe Walter"
---

## Herbert Simcoe Walter

**Dates:** (b. Bishopstoke, Hants 1855-1897)

### Description

half-brother of Gertrude Walter and of Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

He appears in <i>Alumni Oxoniensis</i> as born 1855/6 which is consistent with the 1891 census, when he was with the Becks in Bildeston, described as MA Pembroke College Oxford and unmarried, although he could be the Herbert Simcoe Walter married in 1888 in Chelsea. [His death was reported in <i>Trewman’s Exeter Flying Post</i> 10 March 1897]

### Letters

- Letter from September 10, 1858.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
